summary: Crystal‑clear audience capture using Beyer M160 ribbons pairs with a classic 1980s Dead show, delivering superb sound and top‑notch performance.
review: All five reviewers rave about the recording’s pristine clarity – the Beyer microphones and room acoustics are described as a perfect match, yielding what many call the best‑sounding Dead show they’ve heard. The performance itself is labeled a classic pull with great playing, though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 5‑star (one 4‑star) reviews praising both the audio fidelity and the musical quality indicate an exceptional show with excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Beyer M160 ribbon mics captured a crystal‑clear, well‑balanced sound; reviewers note perfect room match, minimal coloration and superb detail throughout the electric sets.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as a classic 1980s performance with great energy and tight playing, but provide no specific set‑list details.
